mapper.select: SELECT database_id, instance_id, MAX(collected_at) as collected_at, AVG(avg_elapsed_seconds) as avg_elapsed_seconds, AVG(avg_blocked_seconds) as avg_blocked_seconds, AVG(avg_cost_delay_ms) as avg_cost_delay_ms, SUM(total_dead_tuples) as total_dead_tuples, AVG(worker_utilization_pct) as worker_utilization_pct, SUM(active_vacuum_sessions) as active_vacuum_sessions, SUM(blocked_vacuum_count) as blocked_vacuum_count, MAX(max_workers_configured) as max_workers_configured FROM vacuum_metrics_agg_1m WHERE database_id = #{databaseId} AND instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} GROUP BY database_id, instance_id

SELECT database_id, instance_id, collected_at, total_vacuum_sessions, active_vacuum_sessions, autovacuum_sessions, manual_vacuum_sessions, avg_dead_tuples, max_dead_tuples, total_dead_tuples, dead_tuple_increase_rate, dead_tuple_decrease_rate, net_dead_tuple_change, avg_progress, tables_with_dead_tuples, tables_being_vacuumed, avg_elapsed_seconds, max_elapsed_seconds, avg_cost_delay_ms, avg_blocked_seconds, worker_utilization_pct, max_workers_configured, created_at FROM vacuum_metrics_agg_1m WHERE database_id = #{databaseId} AND instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} ORDER BY collected_at ASC

SELECT database_id, instance_id, MAX(collected_at) as collected_at, AVG(avg_elapsed_seconds) as avg_elapsed_seconds, AVG(avg_blocked_seconds) as avg_blocked_seconds, AVG(avg_cost_delay_ms) as avg_cost_delay_ms, SUM(total_dead_tuples) as total_dead_tuples, AVG(worker_utilization_pct) as worker_utilization_pct, SUM(active_vacuum_sessions) as active_vacuum_sessions, SUM(blocked_vacuum_count) as blocked_vacuum_count, MAX(max_workers_configured) as max_workers_configured FROM vacuum_metrics_agg_5m WHERE database_id = #{databaseId} AND instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} GROUP BY database_id, instance_id

SELECT database_id, instance_id, collected_at, total_vacuum_sessions, active_vacuum_sessions, autovacuum_sessions, manual_vacuum_sessions, avg_dead_tuples, max_dead_tuples, total_dead_tuples, dead_tuple_increase_rate, dead_tuple_decrease_rate, net_dead_tuple_change, avg_progress, tables_with_dead_tuples, tables_being_vacuumed, avg_elapsed_seconds, max_elapsed_seconds, avg_cost_delay_ms, avg_blocked_seconds, worker_utilization_pct, max_workers_configured, created_at FROM vacuum_metrics_agg_5m WHERE database_id = #{databaseId} AND instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} ORDER BY collected_at ASC

SELECT #{databaseId} AS database_id, #{instanceId} AS instance_id, AVG(total_bloat_bytes) AS total_bloat_bytes, AVG(avg_bloat_ratio) AS avg_bloat_ratio, SUM(critical_bloat_tables) AS critical_bloat_tables, AVG(total_table_size_bytes) AS total_table_size_bytes FROM vacuum_metrics_agg_5m WHERE database_id = #{databaseId} AND instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO vacuum_metrics_agg_5m ( database_id, instance_id, collected_at, total_vacuum_sessions, active_vacuum_sessions, autovacuum_sessions, manual_vacuum_sessions, avg_dead_tuples, max_dead_tuples, total_dead_tuples, avg_progress, tables_with_dead_tuples, tables_being_vacuumed, avg_elapsed_seconds, max_elapsed_seconds, dead_tuple_increase_rate, dead_tuple_decrease_rate, net_dead_tuple_change, avg_cost_delay_ms, avg_blocked_seconds, worker_utilization_pct, max_workers_configured, avg_bloat_bytes, max_bloat_bytes, total_bloat_bytes, avg_bloat_ratio, max_bloat_ratio, critical_bloat_tables, total_table_size_bytes, blocked_vacuum_count, max_blocked_seconds, created_at ) VALUES ( #{databaseId}, #{instanceId}, #{collectedAt}, #{totalVacuumSessions}, #{activeVacuumSessions}, #{autovacuumSessions}, #{manualVacuumSessions}, #{avgDeadTuples}, #{maxDeadTuples}, #{totalDeadTuples}, #{avgProgress}, #{tablesWithDeadTuples}, #{tablesBeingVacuumed}, #{avgElapsedSeconds}, #{maxElapsedSeconds}, #{deadTupleIncreaseRate}, #{deadTupleDecreaseRate}, #{netDeadTupleChange}, #{avgCostDelayMs}, #{avgBlockedSeconds}, #{workerUtilizationPct}, #{maxWorkersConfigured}, #{avgBloatBytes}, #{maxBloatBytes}, #{totalBloatBytes}, #{avgBloatRatio}, #{maxBloatRatio}, #{criticalBloatTables}, #{totalTableSizeBytes}, #{blockedVacuumCount}, #{maxBlockedSeconds}, #{createdAt} ) ON CONFLICT (database_id, instance_id, collected_at) DO UPDATE SET total_vacuum_sessions = EXCLUDED.total_vacuum_sessions, active_vacuum_sessions = EXCLUDED.active_vacuum_sessions, avg_elapsed_seconds = EXCLUDED.avg_elapsed_seconds, total_dead_tuples = EXCLUDED.total_dead_tuples, avg_blocked_seconds = EXCLUDED.avg_blocked_seconds, avg_cost_delay_ms = EXCLUDED.avg_cost_delay_ms

INSERT INTO vacuum_metrics_agg_5m ( database_id, instance_id, collected_at, total_vacuum_sessions, active_vacuum_sessions, avg_elapsed_seconds, total_dead_tuples, avg_blocked_seconds, avg_cost_delay_ms, worker_utilization_pct, created_at ) VALUES
( #{item.databaseId}, #{item.instanceId}, #{item.collectedAt}, #{item.totalVacuumSessions}, #{item.activeVacuumSessions}, #{item.avgElapsedSeconds}, #{item.totalDeadTuples}, #{item.avgBlockedSeconds}, #{item.avgCostDelayMs}, #{item.workerUtilizationPct}, #{item.createdAt} )
ON CONFLICT (database_id, instance_id, collected_at) DO NOTHING
